1166057.displayName: CAFE Olé by H-E-B Taste of Austin Medium Roast Ground Coffee - Trial Size
1166057.productDescription:
Pick up this trial-sized sampler of CAFE Olé by H-E-B Taste of Austin ground coffee. It makes 1 pot of coffee that's packed with the flavor of Southern pecans and just a hint of cinnamon. And since it's a small quantity, you're free to try it out before getting a full-sized bag.

• One 1.75 oz sampler bag of ground coffee
• Medium Roast and medium bodied Taste of Austin -
• Taste of Austin: Southern pecans and hint of cinnamon flavors
• 100% Arabica Coffee

Made to Be a Texas Favorite
Many H-E-B brand products are so unique, they could only come from H-E-B — and this is one of them! It’s specially made for Texas tastes and lifestyles, whether it’s the thoughtfully sourced ingredients, the distinctive flavor or the captivating scent. And as always, if it’s got our name on it, you have our word — that’s a 100% guarantee promise!

About CAFE Olé by H-E-B
Launched in 1997, CAFE Olé by H-E-B coffee is available in a variety of flavors and roasts. We begin with high quality Arabica beans harvested from legendary coffee-growing regions throughout the world. They are then roasted with precision and care to bring the artisan difference to your home. Enjoy exploring the complete collection of single cup, bagged ground, bulk beans and cold brew coffee.

5578026.displayName: H-E-B Mi Tienda Mango Refresco Soda 6 pk Cans
5578026.productDescription:
Made with pure cane sugar, H-E-B Mi Tienda Mango Refresco has the bright tropical taste of mango. Best enjoyed ice-cold, this caffeine-free soda is refreshing and perfect for any time of day. Naturally and artificially flavored.

• (6) 12-oz cans of mango soda
• Delicious mango taste
• Made with pure cane sugar
• Caffeine-free
• 0% juice
• Naturally and artificially flavored
• Refreshing beverage option

About H-E-B Mi Tienda™
¡Celebrando nuestra cultura, costumbres, sabores, aromas y sobre todo la pasión de ser auténticos! H-E-B Mi Tienda celebrates traditional Hispanic flavors, scents and experiences. These products are developed with a keen focus on authenticity to recreate cherished family traditions and memories.
